summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Passport Control Admin application with enhanced passport fields. All backend APIs (16/16) and frontend flows tested successfully.
passed_tests: Dashboard page with stats cards and sidebar navigation
Group creation with form validation and success feedback
Passport creation with comprehensive form (English/Arabic fields)
Passport detail view modal with complete information display
Bulk upload page with tabs and file format instructions
Groups list page with passport counts and navigation
Passport deletion with confirmation dialog and stats update
Enhanced passport fields and multiple passport types
Proper data-testid attributes for automated testing
